_comment: Source of truth for Auth/OAuth secret rotation dates. The .github/workflows/secret-rotation-reminder.yml workflow reads this weekly and opens a GitHub issue when a secret nears its due date (due = last_rotated + interval_months). AFTER you rotate a secret, bump its `last_rotated` to the new date here (and in docs/secret-rotation.md) — that resets the reminder to the next cycle. Dates are ISO (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC).

secrets.name: Apple — Sign in with Apple client secret (JWT)
secrets.where: Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Providers → Apple → "Secret Key (for OAuth)"

secrets.name: Microsoft (Azure) — client secret
secrets.where: Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Providers → Azure → "Secret Value"
